about_content.name: Mofiz Rahman
about_content.title: Scientist @ Environment
about_content.tagline: Climate & Sustainability | Reader | Traveller | Storyteller | Teacher| Mentor
about_content.bio: Passionate full-stack developer with 5+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Specialized in React, Node.js, and cloud technologies.

about_content.title: Let's Work Together
about_content.description: I'm always interested in hearing about new projects and opportunities. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, feel free to reach out!

about_content.content: Hi there! 👋 I'm a passionate full-stack developer and designer with over 8 years of experience building beautiful, functional, and user-centered digital experiences. I love turning complex problems into simple, elegant solutions.

items.title: Background
items.content: I started my journey in tech back in 2015, teaching myself to code while working as a graphic designer. Since then, I've worked with startups, agencies, and enterprise companies, wearing many hats and learning something new every day. I believe in continuous learning and staying curious about emerging technologies.

items.title: My Approach
items.content: I believe great products are built at the intersection of design, technology, and user needs. My approach combines technical expertise with design thinking to create solutions that not only work well but feel right. I'm all about clean code, intuitive interfaces, and smooth collaboration.

items.title: What Drives Me
items.content: I'm passionate about creating digital products that make people's lives easier and more enjoyable. Whether it's a sleek web app, a responsive website, or a complex system, I pour my heart into every project. I love the moment when users say "wow, this just works!" – that's what keeps me going.

publication_list.title: Deep Learning Approaches for Natural Language Processing: A Comprehensive Survey
publication_list.publishedIn: IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
publication_list.abstract: This survey provides a comprehensive overview of deep learning techniques applied to natural language processing tasks. We discuss recent advances in transformer architectures, pre-training methods, and their applications across various NLP domains including machine translation, sentiment analysis, and question answering.

publication_list.title: Efficient Training of Large-Scale Neural Networks Using Mixed Precision Techniques
publication_list.publishedIn: Proceedings of the 38th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML)
publication_list.abstract: We present novel mixed precision training techniques that significantly reduce training time and memory consumption for large-scale neural networks. Our approach achieves up to 3x speedup while maintaining model accuracy on various benchmark datasets.

publication_list.title: Automated Code Review Using Machine Learning: Techniques and Applications
publication_list.publishedIn: ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology
publication_list.abstract: This paper explores machine learning approaches for automated code review, including defect detection, code smell identification, and security vulnerability analysis. We present a comprehensive framework that integrates multiple ML models to provide intelligent code review suggestions.

publication_list.title: Blockchain-Based Secure Data Sharing in Healthcare Systems
publication_list.publishedIn: IEEE International Conference on Healthcare Informatics
publication_list.abstract: We propose a blockchain-based framework for secure and privacy-preserving data sharing in healthcare systems. The framework leverages smart contracts and cryptographic techniques to ensure data integrity, auditability, and patient consent management.

publication_list.title: Optimizing Web Performance: A Study of Modern JavaScript Frameworks
publication_list.abstract: This chapter examines the performance characteristics of modern JavaScript frameworks including React, Vue, and Angular. We provide empirical analysis and best practices for optimizing web application performance in production environments.

publication_list.title: Federated Learning for Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning in IoT Networks
publication_list.abstract: We present a federated learning approach tailored for IoT networks with limited bandwidth and heterogeneous devices. Our method achieves comparable accuracy to centralized training while preserving data privacy and reducing communication overhead.

publication_list.title: Explainable AI for Medical Diagnosis: A Clinical Perspective
publication_list.abstract: This study investigates explainable AI techniques for medical diagnosis applications. We present case studies demonstrating how interpretable machine learning models can assist clinicians in making informed decisions while maintaining diagnostic accuracy.

publication_list.title: Real-Time Object Detection Using Edge Computing and Neural Networks
publication_list.abstract: We propose a lightweight neural network architecture optimized for real-time object detection on edge devices. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art accuracy while maintaining inference speeds suitable for resource-constrained environments.

publication_list.title: Graph Neural Networks for Social Network Analysis
publication_list.publishedIn: ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining
publication_list.abstract: We introduce novel graph neural network architectures for analyzing social networks. Our models effectively capture complex relationships and dynamics in large-scale social graphs, enabling improved community detection and influence prediction.

static_contents.title: Privacy Policy
static_contents.subtitle: How I handle and protect your information. 3

sections.title: 1. Information I Collect
sections.content: When you visit my website or work with me, I may collect:
list: Contact information: Name, email, phone number (when you reach out)
Project details: Information you share about your project needs
Website analytics: Basic usage data like pages visited and time spent (via Google Analytics or similar)
Technical data: IP address, browser type, device information

sections.title: 2. How I Use Your Information
list: Respond to your inquiries and communicate about projects
Provide the services you've requested
Improve my website and services
Send occasional updates (only if you've opted in)
sections.note: I do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.title: 3. Cookies & Tracking
sections.content: This website may use cookies and similar technologies to:
list: Remember your preferences
Understand how you use the site (via analytics tools)
Improve your browsing experience
sections.note: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling cookies may affect website functionality.

sections.title: 4. Data Security
sections.content: I take reasonable measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, loss, or misuse. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure. If you're sharing sensitive information, please use secure channels.

sections.title: 5. Third-Party Services
sections.content: This website may use third-party services that collect information:
list: Google Analytics: For website analytics
Contact forms: May use services like Formspree, Google Forms, etc.
Hosting provider: Your data is stored on secure hosting servers
sections.note: These services have their own privacy policies. I choose reputable providers that respect user privacy.

sections.title: 6. Your Rights
list: Request a copy of the information I have about you
Ask me to update or delete your information
Opt out of any communications from me
Withdraw consent for data processing
sections.note: Just reach out, and I'll be happy to help with any of these requests.

sections.title: 7. Data Retention
sections.content: I keep your information only as long as necessary to provide services and fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy. Project-related information is typically retained for a reasonable period after project completion for reference and support purposes.

sections.title: 8. Children's Privacy
sections.content: This website is not intended for children under 13. I do not knowingly collect information from children. If you believe I have collected information from a child, please contact me immediately.

sections.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: I may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Continued use of the website after changes means you accept the updated policy.

static_contents.contactText: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or how I handle your data, feel free to contact me. I'm committed to protecting your privacy and being transparent about data practices.
static_contents.footerText: Your privacy matters. I only collect what's necessary and handle it responsibly. 🔒

static_contents.title: Terms of Service
static_contents.subtitle: Simple and straightforward terms for working together.

sections.title: 1. Services 5
sections.content: I provide freelance services including web development, design, and consulting. Specific project details, deliverables, and timelines will be discussed and agreed upon before starting work.

sections.title: 2. Payment
sections.content: Payment terms will be agreed upon per project. Typically:
list: 50% deposit before starting work
50% upon completion
Hourly projects billed monthly

sections.title: 3. Ownership & Rights
sections.content: Once you've paid in full, you own the final work I create for your project. I may showcase the work in my portfolio. Any pre-existing code or third-party assets have their own licenses.

sections.title: 4. Timeline & Revisions
sections.content: Project timelines are estimates. Most projects include 2-3 rounds of revisions. Delays can happen if feedback or content is delayed. Major changes to the project scope may require additional time and cost.

sections.title: 5. Cancellation
sections.content: Either of us can cancel the project with notice. You'll need to pay for work completed up to that point. Deposits are generally non-refundable once work has started.

sections.title: 6. Disclaimer
sections.content: I'll do my best work, but I can't guarantee specific results like traffic, sales, or rankings. You're responsible for maintaining your site/app and keeping backups after launch.

static_contents.contactText: If anything is unclear or you'd like to discuss terms for your project, feel free to reach out.
static_contents.footerText: By working with me, you agree to these terms. Let's create something great together! ✨

blog_list.author: Mofiz Rahman

static_contents.title: Privacy Policy
static_contents.subtitle: How I handle and protect your information.
static_contents.content:
## 1. Information I Collect 👁️

When you visit my website or work with me, I may collect:

- **Contact information:** Name, email, phone number (when you reach out)
- **Project details:** Information you share about your project needs
- **Website analytics:** Basic usage data like pages visited and time spent (via Google Analytics or similar)
- **Technical data:** IP address, browser type, device information

---

## 2. How I Use Your Information 🗄️

I use your information to:

- Respond to your inquiries and communicate about projects
- Provide the services you've requested
- Improve my website and services
- Send occasional updates (only if you've opted in)

> **Note:** I do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.

---

## 3. Cookies & Tracking 🍪

This website may use cookies and similar technologies to:

- Remember your preferences
- Understand how you use the site (via analytics tools)
- Improve your browsing experience

> **Note:** You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.

---

## 4. Data Security 🔒

I take reasonable measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, loss, or misuse.
However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
If you're sharing sensitive information, please use secure channels.

---

## 5. Third-Party Services 🛡️

This website may use third-party services that collect information:

- **Google Analytics:** For website analytics
- **Contact forms:** Services like Formspree, Google Forms, etc.
- **Hosting provider:** Data is stored on secure hosting servers

> **Note:** These services have their own privacy policies. I choose reputable providers that respect user privacy.

---

## 6. Your Rights 👤✅

You have the right to:

- Request a copy of the information I have about you
- Ask me to update or delete your information
- Opt out of any communications from me
- Withdraw consent for data processing

> **Note:** Just reach out, and I’ll be happy to help with any of these requests.

---

## 7. Data Retention ⏳

I keep your information only as long as necessary to provide services and fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy.
Project-related information is typically retained for a reasonable period after project completion for reference and support purposes.

---

## 8. Children’s Privacy 🧒🛡️

This website is not intended for children under 13.
I do not knowingly collect information from children.
If you believe I have collected information from a child, please contact me immediately.

---

## 9. Changes to This Policy ✉️

I may update this privacy policy from time to time.
Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.
Continued use of the website after changes means you accept the updated policy.

---

## Privacy Questions?

If you have any questions about this privacy policy or how I handle your data, feel free to contact me.
I’m committed to protecting your privacy and being transparent about data practices.

---

**Your privacy matters.**
I only collect what’s necessary and handle it responsibly. 🔒

static_contents.title: Terms of Service
static_contents.subtitle: Simple and straightforward terms for working together.
static_contents.content:
## 1. Services 📄

I provide freelance services including web development, design, and consulting.  
Specific project details, deliverables, and timelines will be discussed and agreed upon before starting work.

---

## 2. Payment 💲

Payment terms will be agreed upon per project. Typically:

- **50% deposit** before starting work
- **50% upon completion**
- **Hourly projects** billed monthly

---

## 3. Ownership & Rights 🛡️

Once you’ve paid in full, you own the final work I create for your project.  
I may showcase the work in my portfolio.

Any pre-existing code or third-party assets are subject to their respective licenses.

---

## 4. Timeline & Revisions ⏳

Project timelines are estimates.  
Most projects include **2–3 rounds of revisions**.

Delays may occur if feedback or required content is delayed.  
Major changes to the project scope may require additional time and cost.

---

## 5. Cancellation ⚠️

Either of us may cancel the project with notice.  
You are responsible for paying for work completed up to the cancellation date.

Deposits are generally **non-refundable** once work has started.

---

## 6. Disclaimer 🛡️

I will always aim to deliver high-quality work, but I cannot guarantee specific outcomes such as traffic, sales, or rankings.

After launch, you are responsible for maintaining your website or application and keeping backups.

---

## Have Questions?

If anything is unclear or you’d like to discuss terms for your project, feel free to reach out.

---

**By working with me, you agree to these terms.**  
Let’s create something great together!

testimonial_list.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonial_list.testimonial: Absolutely exceptional work! The web application exceeded all our expectations. The attention to detail, clean code, and professional communication throughout the project made this a seamless experience. I highly recommend their services to anyone looking for top-tier development work.

testimonial_list.name: Michael Chen
testimonial_list.testimonial: Working with this developer was a game-changer for our project. They brought creative solutions to complex problems and delivered a mobile app that our users absolutely love. The performance is outstanding and the UI is intuitive. Highly professional!
